concept: Dark / With Little or No Light / Shadowed
description: With little or no light; not illuminated. 'Nuelo' names the quality of darkness—absence of light, presence of shadow.
sound_symbolism: The word descends into shadow. 'Nu' begins with inward turning, light fading. The vowel 'e' passes through dimness. Then 'lo' settles into darkness, shadow complete.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'nuelo nua' (dark night). Opposite of 'keru' (bright). Can describe physical darkness or metaphorical obscurity.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Darkness structured life—nights for rest, caves for storage, shadow for cooling.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Dark times teach patience—sitting with difficulty rather than fleeing from it.
